title: task
description: compact_cot.py:784 - alt_dm is packed as signed 16-bit int (struct '>h'), limiting altitude to -3276.8m to +3276.7m. Real-world altitudes exceed this: aircraft at 10000m, high mountain terrain. When _encode_pli calls struct.pack('>h', pli.alt_dm), it raises struct.error for values outside int16 range. Failure scenario: PLI with altitude 5000m -> alt_dm=50000 -> struct.pack fails -> entire message encoding crashes.
close_reason: Already fixed: altitude is clamped to int16 range (-32768 to 32767) before struct.pack at line 783 in gateway/compact_cot.py
